mapper.insert: insert into user_info (id, wx_id, wx_nickname, roles, avatar_url, create_time, update_time, bonus) values (#{id}, #{wxId}, #{wxNickname}, #{roles}, #{avatarUrl}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{bonus})
mapper.update:
update user_info
roles = #{roles},
avatar_url = #{avatarUrl},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
bonus = #{bonus},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from user_info where wx_id = #{wxId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select id, wx_id as wxId, wx_nickname as wxNickname, roles, avatar_url as avatarUrl, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, bonus from user_info
